titles.title: Freedom Hymn (I push, I pull, go back...)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v2 v3 v4 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I push, I pull, go back and forth finding myself pounding on a locked door I try to make it out alone without your help, But I know I'll never win this war

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I can never be, never be, free without you I can never be, never be, me without you!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: This is the sound of chains breaking, This is the beat of a heart changing, This is a song of a soul forgiven

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: This is my freedom hymn, This is my freedom hymn, My freedom hymn

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I breathe the air of freedom in knowing my life, Is better off in Your hands The past is gone, What's done is done Now I'm alive And I'm never gonna look back.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Who the Son sets (free) Is free indeed Who the Son sets Is free indeed Who the Son sets Is free, I'm free
